markdown:
# Sentinel

You gain the following benefits.

## Guardian

Immediately after a creature within 5 feet of you takes the [[disengage]] action or hits a target other than you with an attack, you can make an [[opportunity_attack Attack]] against that creature.

## Halt

When you hit a creature with an [[opportunity_attack Attack]], the creature's [[speed]] becomes 0 for the rest of the current turn.
